note: Fame>=55 flagged players + unmatched legends, verified against live English Wikipedia (intro extracts + infobox wikitext) and news sources on 2026-07-14. league null = leave unchanged (non-big-5 keeps stale league per convention). new_club=true: club string not in players_db; current_team uses the canonical English Wikipedia name and will land in unresolved_clubs.json for manual mapping. NOTE: filename does not match apply_player_patches.py glob patch_*.json by design; lead handles inclusion at apply time.
